texts.desc:
You can only use the ① and ② effects of this card's name once per turn.
①：Send 1 card that mentions "Dark Time Wizard" from your Deck to the GY, except "Foolish Graverobber", then you can Special Summon 1 monster from either GY to your field.
②：You can banish this card from your GY; Set 1 of these cards to your field.
● Spell/Trap in your GY that mentions "Dark Time Wizard", except "Foolish Graverobber".
● Spell/Trap in your opponent's GY.
texts.name: Foolish Graverobber
